title: Wild Forest - Organic & Vegan, Luxury Scented Candles. Hand Poured in Loch Lomond, Scotland (+8 Scent Options) 450g
features: INGREDIENTS - 90% Soy Wax, 10% Fragrance Oil. Organic & Vegan
WICK - German made ECO wick. This is a flat, core-less cotton wick braided with thin paper filaments. Always trim to 4mm-6mm before every burn.

SCENT NOTES - Our best selling fragrance has a sensual woody & floral scent. Wild Forest has top notes of bergamot, orange flower, jasmine and a soft cashmere, resting on a base of musk, amber and cedarwood.
description: Product Description Fresh Linen Similar profile of a well known fabric softener. This fragrance has a fresh floral citrus top note, with underlying tones of mandarin, apple, freesia and a base of vanilla. Wild Forest Our best selling fragrance has a sensual woody & floral scent. Wild Forest has top notes of bergamot, orange flower, jasmine and a soft cashmere, resting on a base of musk, amber and cedarwood. Summer Holiday This has a clean, fresh, and uplifting scent profile. Full of flavour and sweet notes of coconut, pineapple & grapefruit, with undertones of peach to finish. Sweet Rhubarb This fragrance is an all time candle favourite. With rich, sweet confectionary notes, this ripe rhubarb has a base note of vanilla custard. Clean Citrus A must have for citrus lovers, this scent has a lively and strong blend of orange, pink grapefruit, pineapple & lemon, with a subtle undertone of thyme to offset the sharpness. Black Currants This scent has a rich and luscious blend of ripe black raspberries, strawberries, and sweet fig. It also has undertones of musk and vanilla to create a very full and complex fruit. Winter Alpine Filled with fragrances of snow covered pines, woodsy tones of cedarwood & sandalwood and an undertone of coastal sea-fennel, this winter candle has a crisp and fresh profile. Island Living Full, fresh notes of tropical coconut, bergamot, with hints of amber, vanilla and shea butter. This candle blooms with a gorgeous blend of island fragrances and rightly deserves a top spot among candle aficionados. Organic & Vegan Scented Candles Our candles are lovingly made every week in our studio space in Loch Lomond, Scotland, which are naturally organic & vegan. They are made with 100% natural soy wax, each scented with a carefully selected blend of fragrance oils. The wick used is a German made ECO wick, which is a flat, core-less cotton wick, braided with thin paper filaments which produces a clean and even burn. - All candles are poured in small batches and left to set in our workshop, where on completion and quality control, they are packaged into printed recycled cardboard tubes. - As with all candles, please remember to trim your wicks to 4-6mm prior to every burn. All candles must be discontinued once there is 1cm of wax left at the bottom for health and safety. - We take pride in our genuine commitment to an ethos of quality, simplicity and accessibility. Ingredients 90% Natural Soy Wax, 10% Fragrance Oil Single Wick Candles - 450g 90mm x 80mm Weight - 450g Volume - 295ml Burn Time - Approx. 45 hrs Double Wick Candles - 760g 100mm x 90mm Weight - 760g Volume - 420ml Burn Time - Approx. 65 hrs Engraved Bamboo Topper The accompanying bamboo topper (with rubber seal) should lock in the scent in between burns and will keep the candle from drying out. Even with infrequent burns, this topper should keep your candle in good condition and it should increase the longevity and lifespan of your candle. Our bespoke kraft brown cardboard shipping tube Finally, all of our candles are packaged into printed cardboard tubes. The structure and rigidity keeps our candles secure in transit. Our subtle packaging choice is thoughtfully produced with a nod to the circular economy. - 150gsm brown kraft paper, with single colour matte CMYK printing. - Please recycle when finished.
